announcements.title: Let Her Go
announcements.description:
Well you only need the light when its burning low,
Only miss the sun when it starts to snow, only know you love her when you let her go.

announcements.title: Updated Issue/Return Policy â€” Effective Aug 1
announcements.description: New component return timelines and late-fee structure have been introduced. Please review the updated policy PDF before your next checkout.

announcements.title: Summer Project Submissions Due
announcements.description: All summer project reports and component returns must be completed by June 30. Contact the lab team for extension requests.

announcements.title: New Lab Manual Available â€” RF Lab
announcements.description: The updated RF & Applied Electromagnetics Lab manual is now available for download. Covers all new experiments added for the Monsoon semester.

labs.name: Digital Circuits Lab
labs.title: Digital Circuits Lab
labs.description: Dedicated to concepts and implementation of basic circuits design - a teaching lab supporting course projects for up to 40 students per session.

labs.name: Circuits & Innovation Lab
labs.title: Circuits & Innovation Lab
labs.description: Analog & digital circuits, microcontrollers - 50 students per session.

labs.name: Basic Electronics Lab
labs.title: Basic Electronics Lab
labs.description: Digital circuits, basic electronics, circuit theory & devices - 50 students per session.

labs.name: RF & Applied Electromagnetics Lab
labs.title: RF & Applied Electromagnetics Lab
labs.description: High-frequency instruments, licensed software, PCB fabrication - research and course projects.

labs.name: Shannon Lab
labs.title: Shannon Lab
labs.description: Wireless communication, signal processing, robotics, automation - teaching and research.

labs.name: Advanced ECE Lab
labs.title: Advanced ECE Lab
labs.description: 5G testbed, RIS/ORIS setups, D2D communication, real-time signal processing.

labs.name: Applied Electronics Engineering Lab
labs.title: Applied Electronics Engineering Lab
labs.description: Hands-on applied electronics, embedded systems, and engineering design projects.

labs.name: M. Tech. Lab
labs.title: M. Tech. Lab
labs.description: Dedicated workspace for postgraduate research and thesis projects in ECE.

labs.name: RF Characterization Facility
labs.title: RF Characterization Facility
labs.description: Specialized RF testing, antenna characterization, and high-frequency measurements.

gallery.label: TinkerHack
gallery.description: TinkerHack is our flagship hackathon event where students collaborate on innovative electronics and embedded systems projects in a 24-hour challenge.

gallery.label: Electrivire
gallery.description: Electrivire is an annual technical showcase where ECE students present their semester projects spanning circuits, signal processing, and wireless communication.

gallery.label: RF Workshop
gallery.description: Our RF & Wireless workshop brings industry experts to train students on radio frequency engineering, antenna design, and spectrum analysis using live equipment.

gallery.label: HACKiT
gallery.description: HACKiT is a collaborative coding & hardware hack event organized by ECE Labs for students passionate about building real-world solutions from scratch.

gallery.label: V2V Workshop
gallery.description: The V2V (Vehicle-to-Vehicle) Communication Workshop explored cutting-edge DSRC and C-V2X protocols with live demonstrations and hands-on experiments.

gallery.label: NS3 Workshop
gallery.description: The NS3 Network Simulator Workshop trained participants to simulate complex network topologies and analyze protocol behavior using the NS-3 open-source platform.

gallery.label: Lab Video
gallery.description: A glimpse inside the ECE Labs â€” our state-of-the-art facilities, dedicated research engineers, and vibrant student community working together every day.

projects.title: Touchless Tap
projects.description: ECE Lab developed a cost-effective sensor-based water tap that works when it detects your hand under the nozzle. Designed by Research Engineers Sana & Khagendra.

projects.title: ELEO Chatbot (v1)
projects.description: The first version of ELEO (ECE Lab Enquiry Officer) was a simple rule-based, keyword-matching and word-search chatbot â€” not AI-powered. It could only return pre-written single responses to recognized keywords. It was built by B.Tech student Jayan Pahuja under the guidance of Sana Ali Naqvi & Khagendra Joshi. This version has since been completely replaced by the AI-powered v2.

projects.title: ELEO AI Assistant (v2)
projects.description: The current ELEO chatbot is a fully AI-powered assistant, built from scratch by Rahul Pardasani (M.Tech CSE 2025, Roll No. MT25035). It uses large language models (LLMs), a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline with a FAISS vector knowledge base, and a LangGraph-based multi-step reasoning agent. This is a complete rebuild with no relation to the old keyword-search v1. Rahul Pardasani developed the ELEO AI chatbot.

projects.title: ECE Labs Website (v2)
projects.description: The official ECE Labs website was upgraded and built as a team project by Rahul Pardasani, Rohit Kumar, and Reehan Sarmah, all from the M.Tech CSE batch of 2025.

projects.title: Light Automation
projects.description: A summer project aimed at making ECE-Labs fully automated, beginning with lights using Arduino, PIR sensors, relays, and lab resources. Designed by Paritosh & Amisha under the guidance of Engineer Abhishek Kumar.

projects.title: Smart Energy Monitor
projects.description: A real-time power consumption monitoring system for ECE lab equipment using IoT sensors and a live dashboard. Built by B.Tech students under Engineer Abhishek Kumar.

projects.title: RF Signal Analyser
projects.description: A low-cost spectrum analyser prototype to measure RF signals in the 100 MHzâ€“2 GHz range, designed and tested inside the RF Lab by M.Tech research students.

projects.title: Gesture-Controlled Robot
projects.description: A wireless robot controlled via hand gestures captured through a flex-sensor glove. Demonstrated at IIIT Delhi's annual tech fest as an ECE Lab showcase project.

projects.title: Embedded OS Scheduler
projects.description: A minimal preemptive task scheduler implemented on ARM Cortex-M4 for embedded systems coursework, integrating priority queues and round-robin scheduling.

projects.title: Autonomous Line Follower
projects.description: A PID-controlled line-following robot built using IR sensors and an Arduino Mega, achieving sub-10ms response times on a competitive track layout.

projects.title: Lab Equipment Tracker
projects.description: A full-stack web app to track issue, return, and availability status of lab equipment in real time, reducing manual inventory overhead by over 60%.
